description: Respond to a short greeting from the user.
Respond to a short acknowledgment or thanks.
Tell the user the current local time.
Tell the user today's date.
Look up the date of a named public holiday in a country and year.
examples: what day is thanksgiving this year
what date is boxing day in australia
when does labor day happen in the us

description: List public holidays for a country in a given year.
examples: list holidays in japan this year
what holidays does canada have in 2026

description: Tell the user how many days remain until a date or named holiday.
Spell or repeat a requested word for the user.
Recall the most recent movie or media title from recent conversation context.
examples: what movie were we talking about

description: Turn on or off a home device, switch a setting, or adjust device state. This is an imperative action — the user is telling the device what to do, not asking what state it is in.
examples: turn on the living room fan

description: Compose and send a short text message to a person.
examples: text Anakin that I'm running late

send_text: text Leia that i am running late
send a message to Luke saying dinner is ready
text my sister i'll be there in 10 minutes

description: Convert a quantity between units of measure (length, volume, mass, temperature).
examples: how many quarts in a gallon
how many feet in a mile
72 degrees f is how much in celsius

convert: how many cups are in a quart

description: Calculate a tip on a bill, optionally splitting the total between people.
examples: split a dinner bill with tip

description: Convert an amount between currencies using current exchange rates.
examples: how much is 200 euros in dollars

description: Look up the current exchange rate between two currencies.
examples: what's the gbp to usd rate right now
what is the yen to dollar rate

description: Report the current weather forecast or whether precipitation is expected.

get_forecast: what is the forecast for today

description: Look up local movie showtimes for a film title.
examples: what time is the new mario movie playing
when is the new batman movie showing
what time does the godfather start
movie times for the mario movie
show me movie times for hoppers in 06461

description: Tell the user when a known person's birthday is.
examples: tell me when my sister was born

description: Answer a general factual, definitional, explanatory, comparative, or troubleshooting question that needs world knowledge (people, places, history, science, media facts, how things work, why things happen, definitions, comparisons).
examples: what is the runtime of the godfather
did the tv show taxi have a finale
how much copper is in a us penny
what year did world war 2 end
what is the capital of france
what does the acronym sql mean
why do leaves change color in fall
what is the difference between a virus and bacteria
what's the difference between ram and rom
how do i fix slow wifi
why is my phone battery draining so fast
what is the best laptop for gaming
how do you make sourdough bread

description: Read the current indoor temperature from a household sensor.
examples: how cold is it in here

description: Check whether a person is currently in a specific room or area of the house.
examples: is anyone in the living room

description: Read the current open/closed/on/off/locked state of a household device or fixture.
examples: did i lock the back door

description: Tell the user the current local time in a specific city or timezone.
examples: what time is it in tokyo
what's the current time in london
what time is it in sydney
what time zone is honolulu in

description: Draft an email message in a specified tone or for a specified purpose.
examples: write a professional email asking for a refund
draft an email to my boss about taking time off
compose an email declining the meeting
write a thank you email to my interviewer

description: Generate, debug, explain, optimize, or refactor code in any programming language.
examples: implement a binary search in go

assist: write a sql query to group by month

description: Produce a short summary of a longer piece of text or article.
examples: give me a tldr of this

description: Generate a multi-step plan such as a trip itinerary, workout schedule, study plan, or weekly plan.
examples: plan a 3 day trip to nyc
make me a study plan for next week

description: Compare two or more concrete options the user is choosing between and weigh the pros and cons.
examples: should i invest 10k or save it
should i buy or rent a house
should i take the job offer or stay
which is better an iphone or android
should i go to grad school or get a job

description: Recommend products to buy in a category, optionally with a budget or use-case constraint.
examples: find me a budget mechanical keyboard
what should i buy for a new puppy

description: Look up the dictionary definition, part of speech, and pronunciation of a word.

define_word: what is the definition of opaque

description: Fetch current news headlines from a major news aggregator, optionally filtered by topic (world, us, business, tech, sports, science, health, entertainment).
Give the user a short morning news briefing with a few top stories.
examples: catch me up on the news
brief me on the top stories

description: Search recent news coverage for a specific topic or event.
examples: what's the latest on the ukraine war

description: Look up a cooking recipe by dish name or main ingredient.
examples: how do you make banana bread
show me a recipe for chili
find me a recipe for pad thai
give me a recipe for lasagna

description: Tell a short, family-friendly joke.
Look up details about a TV series — network, status, rating, recent episodes.
examples: tell me about the tv show breaking bad
tell me about better call saul

description: Respond with empathy and supportive language when the user expresses a difficult feeling such as sadness, frustration, anxiety, or being stuck.
examples: i'm frustrated my code isn't working

empathize: i feel really anxious right now

description: Fallback conversational response when no capability strongly matches.
Create a calendar event in the local prototype calendar store.
examples: add lunch with Leia tomorrow at 1pm

description: Read calendar events from the local prototype calendar store.
examples: what is on my calendar today

description: Update an existing local prototype calendar event.
Delete a local prototype calendar event.
Set an alarm in the local prototype alarm store.
Set a timer in the local prototype timer store.
Set a reminder in the local prototype reminder store.
examples: remind me to call Luke at 6pm

description: Cancel an alarm in the local prototype alarm store.
List alarms in the local prototype alarm store.
examples: what alarms do i have set

description: Search contacts in the local prototype contacts store.
Read recent messages from the local prototype messages store.
examples: read my last texts from Leia

description: Read emails from the local prototype inbox store.
Start a phone call from the local prototype call log backend.
Create a note in the local prototype note store.
examples: note that the meeting moved to Thursday

description: Append items to a local prototype list.
examples: add milk and eggs to my grocery list

description: Read a local prototype list.
examples: what is on my grocery list

description: Search notes in the local prototype note store.
Play music in the local prototype playback state store.
Control playback in the local prototype playback state store.
Read the local prototype now playing state.
Set the local prototype playback volume.
Look up track metadata from MusicBrainz.
Get driving directions using Nominatim and OSRM.
examples: how do i get to the airport from here
drive from Hoboken to Newark Airport

description: Get driving ETA using Nominatim and OSRM.
examples: how long will it take to drive downtown

description: Find nearby places using Overpass and OpenStreetMap.
Find transit directions via web search fallback.
examples: next train from Hoboken to Penn Station

description: Find streaming availability from a curated local catalog.
Search flights from a curated local routes knowledge base.
examples: flights from JFK to London next Friday

description: Check flight status via web search fallback.
Search hotels from a curated local chains knowledge base.
examples: hotels in Rome for 3 nights in June

description: Look up visa requirements via web search fallback.
examples: do i need a visa for Thailand on a US passport

description: Look up symptom information via MedlinePlus (DuckDuckGo web search).
examples: what causes a sharp pain behind the knee

description: Look up medication information via MedlinePlus (DuckDuckGo web search).
examples: can i take ibuprofen with amoxicillin

description: Log a workout in the local prototype fitness store.
Read the local prototype fitness summary.
Look up a person fact via DuckDuckGo web search.
Activate a named smart home scene in the local prototype smart home backend.
Look up nutrition data from Open Food Facts.
Suggest a substitute for a cooking ingredient.
examples: what can i use instead of buttermilk

description: Create a local prototype food order draft.
Evaluate a small arithmetic expression.
Translate text to another language.
examples: translate where is the bathroom to french
how do you say good morning in spanish
translate i am running late to japanese

description: Look up a TV show schedule using TVMaze.
examples: when is Greys Anatomy on tonight

description: Look up a stock price from a curated local knowledge graph.
Look up stock profile information from Yahoo Finance.
Look up a live sports score via ESPN scoreboard API.
examples: what is the score of the Lakers game

description: Look up sports standings via ESPN standings API.
examples: what place are the Red Sox in

description: Look up sports schedules via ESPN scoreboard API.
examples: when do the Yankees play next

description: Look up player stats via ESPN API (stub — provider incomplete).
examples: how many touchdowns does Mahomes have this year

description: Search the web for current information using DuckDuckGo.
examples: search the web for python 3.13 release date
look up the latest news about SpaceX
search for best restaurants in Austin
find information about raspberry pi 5 specs
web search for climate change statistics

description: Look up details about a movie — title, release year, rating, synopsis.
examples: tell me about the movie inception
what is the movie avatar about
look up the movie the godfather

description: Search for movies matching a query.
examples: search for movies about time travel

description: Look up a person by their relationship to the user (e.g. brother, wife, best friend).
List all known family members and relationships.
Get episode details for a TV show — season, episode, title, air date.
examples: what are the latest episodes of breaking bad
show me episodes of the office
what episode is game of thrones on
